playground.headline: Where the fluid sim gets to play.
playground.lede: Two shader experiments, both anchored to the ink-and-print narrative. Pure craft demonstration, no product context.

inkDropStudio.cardBody: Empty paper canvas, click spawns ink droplets in the chosen spot colour. Sliders for sim parameters, bomb button, freeze button.
inkDropStudio.title: Ink Drop Studio.
inkDropStudio.caption: Playground for the hero simulation. Click = ink splat, sliders = sim parameters, 'Bomb' if you're in the mood for chaos.
inkDropStudio.reducedMotionNote: This experiment is a moving playground. Under prefers-reduced-motion I hide the running simulation. Head back to the Playground for a quieter section.

typeAsFluid.cardBody: Type a word. It gets printed, then swallowed by the ink. Gently.
typeAsFluid.title: Type-as-Fluid.
typeAsFluid.caption: Type a word. It gets printed, then swallowed by the ink. Gently.
typeAsFluid.reducedMotionNote: This experiment prints words live into a running fluid simulation. Under prefers-reduced-motion I hide the animation. Head back to the Playground for a quieter section.
